title: Kling AI Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Kling AI for image generation tasks.

commands.command: Create an image of a sunset over the ocean
commands.description: Generates an image depicting a sunset over the ocean.
commands.scenario: When you need a scenic image for a presentation or social media.

commands.description: Creates a cartoon-style avatar image.
commands.scenario: When you want a fun, personalized avatar for online profiles.

commands.command: Design a logo for a tech startup
commands.description: Produces a logo design suitable for a tech startup.
commands.scenario: When starting a new business and need a logo.

commands.description: Generates a poster with a vintage aesthetic.
commands.scenario: When creating promotional material with a retro feel.

commands.description: Produces an image of a fantasy landscape.
commands.scenario: When you need creative artwork for a story or game.

commands.description: Creates a realistic portrait image.
commands.scenario: When you need a lifelike portrait for a project.

commands.description: Generates an illustration for a children's book.
commands.scenario: When illustrating a scene for a children's book project.

commands.description: Produces an image of a futuristic city.
commands.scenario: When you need a sci-fi themed cityscape for a project.

commands.description: Creates a piece of minimalist art.
commands.scenario: When you want simple yet elegant artwork for decor.

commands.description: Produces an image of a fantasy creature.
commands.scenario: When creating characters for a game or story.

commands.description: Generates a surreal piece of art.
commands.scenario: When you need imaginative and dream-like imagery.

commands.description: Produces a detailed botanical illustration.
commands.scenario: When illustrating plants for educational or decorative purposes.

commands.description: Creates a short comic strip image.
commands.scenario: When you want to tell a story or joke in comic form.

commands.description: Produces a design for a custom tattoo.
commands.scenario: When you want a unique tattoo design.

commands.description: Generates a digital collage from various images.
commands.scenario: When you want to combine multiple images into one artwork.

commands.command: Apply 'Cinematic Lighting' and 'Depth of Field' to a portrait
commands.description: Use these specific photography terms to add professional bokeh (blurred background) and dramatic light shadows to any subject.

commands.command: Generate an 'Isometric 3D Render' of a room
commands.description: Use 'Isometric' to create a clean, 3D miniature-style view often used in game design and icon sets.

commands.command: Create a 'Double Exposure' effect combining two subjects
commands.description: A power-user trick to blend two images (e.g., a forest inside a wolf's silhouette) for high-end artistic results.
Add 'Macro' to your prompt to capture intense detail in small objects like insects, textures, or water droplets.
A specific historical art style command that produces beautiful, traditional Japanese woodblock print aesthetics.
